encounter.location: Rocky Mountain Women's Health, Denver, CO

document_references.description: Brief telephone encounter note documenting Dr. Forsythe's call to Lisa confirming scheduling of MFM consultation with Dr. Whitfield (05/19/2025) and hematology consultation with Dr. Okafor (05/28/2025). Documents emotional check-in — patient coping but struggling, continuing weekly EAP therapy. Counseled on timeline for attempting pregnancy (await confirmatory APS testing ~July 2025 and specialist input). Plan to follow up after specialist consultations.
